title: Substack adds AI detection to fight ‘Claudefishing’
summary: In a pointed post titled “Against Claudefishing,” chief executive Chris Best said readers can now scan posts, notes, replies, and comments. The researcher Mor Naaman called detection a losing battle: if readers scan, writers will scan too, and route around it.
caption: output/2026-07-22/substack-adds-ai-detection-to-fight-claudefishing.txt
